name: ai-mobile
description: AI Mobile Codex Plugin for orchestrating mobile-started Codex work across local Antigravity CLI, Antigravity desktop, Claude Code, and Cursor workers on Windows.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrate mobile-started Codex sessions across local Antigravity, Claude Code, and Cursor workers.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile turns Codex into a local team orchestrator for Windows. It can plan and run coordinated lanes across Codex, Antigravity CLI, Antigravity desktop, Claude Code, and Cursor when available. The plugin exposes MCP tools for setup/status checks, Antigravity model availability, 5-hour team planning, one-call worker dispatch, durable .antigravity-bridge job artifacts, existing Antigravity chat selection, model switching, compact job readback, DevTools UI fallback, and privacy scanning. Startup is passive: Antigravity opens or repairs only when a user-requested workflow requires it.
